subject: Fix merge build fail on docker build
commit_message:
Fix merge build fail on docker build

Docker build was failing on git.commit.message.short label
when commit message included double quote mark, which
happens when auto-merging commits.

Quotes around ${git.commit.message.short} were changed
to single quote marks as those are used less frequently.

Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2824
Signed-off-by: Remigiusz Janeczek <remigiusz.janeczek@nokia.com>
Change-Id: I1f3622df233ff22a4c312ce1055cf8029880fa09

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

This patch would fix failures when merge commit is created, but fails could still happen when single quote mark was used in the first line of commit message. I couldn't find any other solution, unless removing the label would be preferred. What do you think?

Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> This patch would fix failures when merge commit is created, but fails could still happen when single quote mark was used in the first line of commit message. I couldn't find any other solution, unless removing the label would be preferred. What do you think?

The fix is okay and should address the quotes introduced by merge commit. If we see other issue again, label can be removed
Change has been successfully merged by Vijay Venkatesh Kumar
